description: Import a 3D model into Houdini. In the Network Editor at the /obj level, create a new Geometry node. Inside that Geometry node, add a File SOP node and set its file path to '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/data/bunny.obj' to load the Stanford Bunny model. After importing, verify the model is visible in the Scene View (viewport). Then save the scene as '/home/ga/HoudiniProjects/imported_bunny.hipnc' using File > Save As.
